caption: A man wearing a white baseball cap, a black hoodie with "BOSS" printed on the chest, and a gold chain is seated at a table in a studio. He is looking down at a gold-colored smartphone held in both hands. To his right is a black professional microphone on a boom arm. The background features a white banner with yellow stars and the phrase "UNICORN HUSTLE" repeated. Behind him, a blue and red sign reads "Where BOSSES Talk!" and "TALK 101". On the table, there is a black box and a blue cylinder featuring "TALK 101" and "Where BOSSES Talk!". In the bottom left corner, a small logo reads "BOSS TALK 101". Across the frames, the man remains in the same position, slightly shifting his head and facial expression while continuing to interact with his phone.
